dashboard.label: API Attack Surface Auditor — Security Dashboard
dashboard.description: Generated by API Attack Surface Auditor v6.0 | Target: http://localhost:3001 | Scan: 2026-07-10 16:33:36 | Vulnerabilities: 8 | Passed: 9

panel.html:
Vulnerability Details
Severity Category MITRE ATT&CK CVSS Detail
Critical SQL Injection T1190 — Exploit Public-Facing Application 9.8 500 error on GET /api/activities with payload in field 'limit'...
Critical SQL Injection T1190 — Exploit Public-Facing Application 9.8 500 error on GET /api/activities with payload in field 'page'...
High Missing Header: Content-Security-Policy T1059.007 — JavaScript (XSS enablement) 4.7 'Content-Security-Policy' absent on: /api/health, /api/activities, /api/notifications. Prevents XSS ...
Medium Missing Rate Limiting T1110 — Brute Force 5.3 50 rapid login attempts completed with no 429 — brute-force is unrestricted...
Low API Discovery T1592 — Gather Victim Host Information 5.3 No OpenAPI spec found at any of 12 common paths — API surface is undocumented, making security revie...
Low Missing Header: Permissions-Policy T1185 — Browser Session Hijacking 3.1 'Permissions-Policy' absent on: /api/health, /api/activities, /api/notifications. Restricts browser ...
Info Missing Auth T1078 — Valid Accounts 5.3 /api/health returns 200 with no token (intentionally public — accepted risk)...
Info TLS — HTTP Only (localhost) T1557 — Adversary-in-the-Middle 4.8 Target is running over HTTP on localhost — expected for development. Ensure production deployment us...
Generated by API Attack Surface Auditor v6.0 · github.com/pratham2104/api-attack-surface-auditor · Pratham Agarwal — CS & Data Science, Central Michigan University
